thesis: ONGC pairs strong, rising analyst revisions with top-decile cheapness and a stable large-cap energy profile; the cheapness gives downside support while revisions provide the 1-6mo tilt.
falsification: Crude and gas realizations roll over and analyst revisions turn falling, or the stock de-rates further despite cheapness over the next two quarters.

thesis: Diversified metals exposure with confirming momentum and rising revisions; a structural commodity-cycle and deleveraging story I already own at size.
falsification: Metals prices fall and revisions roll over, or balance-sheet/dividend concerns re-emerge, taking momentum negative.

thesis: NMDC shows strong rising analyst revisions and above-peer cheapness with neutral-to-positive momentum — a confirmed materials tilt, not a single-signal chase.
falsification: Iron ore prices and revisions both weaken, or volumes disappoint and momentum turns clearly negative.

thesis: NALCO combines rising revisions with positive relative momentum and fair value, a multi-force aluminium expression with large-cap liquidity.
falsification: Aluminium/alumina prices fall, revisions turn falling, and relative momentum drops below peers.

thesis: Coal India offers rising revisions, genuine cheapness and a defensive dividend yield — a lower-beta way to hold the energy tilt.
falsification: Volumes/e-auction premia fall, revisions turn falling, or a sharp policy/ESG de-rating hits the multiple.

thesis: Hindalco pairs rising revisions with above-peer cheapness and a large-cap downstream aluminium franchise; momentum mildly positive.
falsification: Novelis spreads compress, aluminium falls, and revisions turn falling over the next two quarters.

thesis: SAIL is among the cheapest large-cap steelmakers with rising revisions and improving momentum — a value-plus-revision cyclical.
falsification: Steel prices and spreads weaken, revisions fade, and the cheapness becomes a value trap with falling momentum.

thesis: BSE has strong momentum and rising revisions on a structural rise in market activity/derivatives; an asset-light compounder tilt.
falsification: Cash/derivative volumes fall, regulatory caps bite, and momentum plus revisions both roll over.

thesis: MCX combines strong relative momentum with rising revisions on growing commodity-derivative volumes and a tech-platform tailwind.
falsification: Volume growth stalls, a competitor gains share, and revisions/momentum both turn negative.

thesis: CG Power rides the electrical-equipment/transmission capex cycle with rising revisions and confirming momentum; a large-cap capex tilt.
falsification: Order inflows slow, margins compress, and revisions turn falling with momentum fading.

thesis: Hitachi Energy India is a direct grid-modernisation capex play with strong momentum and supportive revisions; structural electrification tailwind.
falsification: Capex cycle cools, valuation (already rich) de-rates, and momentum plus revisions both turn negative.

thesis: NTPC is a cheap, large-cap regulated-return utility with a capacity-addition growth angle and mildly rising revisions — defensive carry in the book.
falsification: Regulatory returns are cut, capex disappoints, or revisions turn falling alongside weak momentum.

thesis: Power Grid offers stable regulated cash flows and a transmission-capex tailwind with supportive revisions — defensive large-cap ballast.
falsification: Tariff/regulatory risk materializes, capex slows, and revisions turn falling.

thesis: Bajaj Auto shows rising revisions and a premiumisation/export recovery; a quality large-cap auto I keep at size.
falsification: Export demand and domestic 2W volumes weaken and revisions turn falling.

thesis: Eicher's Royal Enfield premium franchise has rising revisions and pricing power; I hold through a momentum lull.
falsification: RE volumes stall, competition erodes share, and revisions turn falling.

thesis: TVS combines a strong EV transition and export mix with supportive revisions; a structural 2W hold.
falsification: EV margins disappoint, volumes slow, and revisions roll over.

thesis: M&M's SUV and tractor leadership with a farm-cycle tailwind justifies a core large-cap auto hold even with neutral revisions.
falsification: SUV order book and tractor demand weaken and revisions turn clearly negative.

thesis: n/a
falsification: n/a

thesis: Axis offers a re-rating path on improving deposit franchise and credit quality with supportive revisions; core large-cap bank.
falsification: Asset-quality slippage or NIM pressure with revisions turning falling.

thesis: SBI is a cheap, systemically dominant lender with strong PSU deposit franchise; cheapness cushions soft revisions.
falsification: Credit costs rise sharply, cheapness proves a trap, and revisions stay clearly falling.

thesis: Kotak's conservative underwriting and strong capital make it a quality core financial; held for benchmark integrity.
falsification: Growth stays subdued, ROEs compress, and revisions turn falling.

thesis: Chola pairs strong rising revisions with a durable vehicle/loan-against-property growth franchise; a quality NBFC add.
falsification: Asset quality deteriorates, growth slows, and revisions turn falling.

thesis: n/a
falsification: n/a

thesis: Reliance's retail/Jio compounding plus refining optionality warrants a benchmark-anchor hold; soft momentum is a chance to keep rather than chase.
falsification: Retail/telecom growth disappoints, refining margins compress, and revisions stay falling.

thesis: Sun Pharma's specialty-pipeline and US franchise make it the core large-cap pharma ballast even with neutral revisions.
falsification: Specialty ramp disappoints or US pricing pressure with revisions turning falling.

thesis: Apollo Hospitals rides structural healthcare demand and a digital/pharmacy optionality; a quality large-cap healthcare hold.
falsification: Occupancy/ARPOB growth slows or digital losses widen with revisions falling.

thesis: Titan's jewellery formalisation and premiumisation story is a durable large-cap consumer compounder; modestly rising revisions.
falsification: Jewellery demand and margins weaken and revisions turn falling.

thesis: Trent's Zudio-led store expansion is structural, but rich valuation and soft momentum warrant a smaller weight.
falsification: Same-store growth slows, valuation de-rates, and revisions turn falling.

thesis: Asian Paints shows strongly rising revisions even as momentum lags, suggesting an analyst-led recovery setup in a quality franchise.
falsification: Volume/margin pressure from new entrants persists and the strong revisions reverse to falling.

thesis: HUL is the core defensive FMCG anchor with pricing power and rural-recovery optionality; held for benchmark balance.
falsification: Rural demand stays weak, margins compress, and revisions turn clearly falling.

thesis: TCS pairs rising revisions with sector-leading margins and a large-cap quality profile; an IT-recovery tilt as momentum bottoms.
falsification: Discretionary IT spend stays weak, deal TCV slows, and revisions turn falling.

thesis: Tech Mahindra's margin-recovery program with rising revisions justifies a reduced continued hold within the IT sleeve.
falsification: Margin recovery stalls and revisions reverse to falling.

thesis: Coforge has strong rising revisions on a robust deal pipeline; a small analyst-led IT add even as momentum lags.
falsification: Deal conversion slows, margins disappoint, and the strong revisions reverse.

thesis: Wipro retains a small IT slot on a turnaround/leadership-stabilisation angle with mildly supportive revisions.
falsification: Growth keeps lagging peers and revisions turn falling.

thesis: Bajaj Finance's diversified consumer-lending franchise and digital scale-up is a durable large-cap NBFC compounder; momentum-weak entry.
falsification: Asset quality deteriorates, AUM growth slows, and revisions turn falling.

thesis: HAL's multi-year defense order book is structural, but soft revisions and rich valuation warrant a reduced weight.
falsification: Order execution slips, valuation de-rates, and revisions turn clearly falling.

thesis: Tata Steel keeps a reduced ferrous slot; I shift weight toward cheaper, stronger-revision SAIL/NMDC.
falsification: European/India steel spreads improve and revisions turn rising, making the trim early.
